ddls:
CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each object */,
  "object_name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of object */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the object was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the object was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the object */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_objects_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the type was last updated */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent type (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the object the state belongs to */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the outcome belongs to */,
  "outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the outcome was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the outcome was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcomes_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the prediction belongs to */,
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outcome being predicted */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used for prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used for prediction */,
  "p_generic_outcome" REAL /* Probability of the generic outcome */,
  "p_exception_outcome" REAL /* Probability of the exception outcome */,
  "p_joint_outcome" REAL /* Probability of the joint outcome */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_id") REFERENCES outcomes ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the permissions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
